title: Decorative paths
description: Paths to decorate your houses and buildings
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d29882c0fad7f5719726d6219bbf70e488fe7d7d.png)!

Decorative path is a mod designed to improve your buildings and landscaping within the game, providing a variety of paths. 
With this mod, you will be able to build paths and roads using blocks of wood and stone, perfect for giving a special touch 
to your villages, gardens, and any construction project you are working on.

![paths](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac313c481a3de322b1f20e4f44251699650e0cb0.png)

10 new paths added 24/02/25

![paths](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/178de5bde85308df074ed0ea974448de5d49c51d.jpeg)

Crafting

![crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cc46f2f1ac9d029f8380ae042397353bd1a6406.png)
